title: Spells & Shields: The Power of Origins
description: Adding origin requirements to spell progression trees.
body:
# Spells & Shields: The Power of Origins

An addon for [Spells & Shields](https://modrinth.com/mod/spells-shields "Spells & Shields") and [Origins](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/origins-forge "Origins").

# Discord
Join my Discord server to get frequent updates about the mod. This is a direct channel to me for feedback & suggestions.

[![discord.gg/3zXwr2atcY](https://i.imgur.com/1FFOXRB.png)](https://discord.gg/3zXwr2atcY)  

[https://discord.gg/3zXwr2atcY](https://discord.gg/3zXwr2atcY "https://discord.gg/3zXwr2atcY")

## Features

- This mod alone does nothing.
- It allows mod pack authors to set certain Origins or Origin Layers as requirements to learn a spell in spell trees.
- Check the wiki for a short guide. It also contains a guide on how to change the maximum mana for specific Origins.
- If you still need help, just ask me how to use it on the linked Discord.

## Affiliate Link
